title: Power BI Data Analytics Job-Ready Bootcamp
subtitle: Master Power BI from Data Cleaning to Executive Dashboards
description: Master Power BI from data cleaning to executive dashboards. Build real business projects, track KPIs, and become job-ready with portfolio + interview prep.

projects.title: Sales Performance Dashboard
projects.description: Track revenue, growth, and KPIs with interactive visuals.

projects.title: Business KPI Dashboard
projects.description: Build executive-level dashboards with filters & drilldowns.

projects.title: Data Cleaning Project
projects.description: Transform messy datasets into analysis-ready format with Power Query.

projects.title: Final Portfolio Dashboard
projects.description: End-to-end BI project (data → model → dashboard → presentation).

requirements: Basic understanding of data (Excel is enough)

curriculum.title: Data Cleaning & Power Query

lessons.title: Introduction to Power BI & ETL Processes
Transforming Messy Datasets in Power Query Editor

curriculum.practice: Clean eCommerce/Sales raw dataset and prepare it for loading
curriculum.outcome: Can clean, format, and load unstructured raw datasets with ease.

curriculum.title: Data Modeling & Star Schema

lessons.title: Understanding Relationships, Star Schema & Snowflake Schema
Creating Active vs Inactive Relationships & Cross Filtering

curriculum.practice: Design an optimized database schema for Business KPIs
curriculum.outcome: Students design efficient schemas and create reliable data models.

curriculum.title: DAX (Data Analysis Expressions)

lessons.title: Calculated Columns vs Measures & Basic DAX Functions

curriculum.practice: Implement KPI calculations, YTD/MTD and growth metrics
curriculum.outcome: Students construct advanced business logic and KPI formulas.

curriculum.title: Dashboard Design & Service Deployment

lessons.title: Visual Storytelling, Layout Design & Interactive Elements
Power BI Service: Publishing, Gateway Setup & RLS

curriculum.practice: Build and publish an executive-level sales performance dashboard
curriculum.outcome: Students deploy interactive dashboards and create professional portfolio reports.

features: Build real business dashboards (Sales, Finance, Marketing)
Learn Power Query + DAX used in actual companies
Focus on job-ready skills, not just theory
Designed for analyst roles (BI / Data Analyst)
